original: a spear of roasted zhor beast meat
A spear of roasted meat, bought steaming off of Lorre’s cookfire and covered in native Uvetan spices. Sure to ward off the cold and fill your belly.
You tear into the roast meat kebab, warmth oozing from your mouth with every bite. Juicy and tender, every mouthful is a delicious slice of heaven that sits warmly in your [pc.belly]. Yum!
